message:
fix(sdk): harden delimiter safety, binding hash coverage, timing sample bounds, and manifest validation

Capability artifact (capability_artifact.rs):
- Fix canonical_repr() delimiter-collision vulnerability: replace
  simple semicolon-delimited format with length-prefixed encoding
  (field_name_len=N;field_name=value) so values containing semicolons
  or field-name substrings cannot cause ambiguous parses
- Bump digest version prefix from v1 to v2 to invalidate cached
  digests computed with the old unsafe encoding
- Add test: canonical_repr_preserves_field_boundaries verifies that
  swapping delimiter substrings between fields produces distinct reprs
- Add test: envelope_digest_changes_when_identity_field_boundaries_change

Migration pipeline (migration_pipeline.rs):
- Fix evidence artifact digest delimiter collision: replace
  extension_names.join(",") with per-element vector hashing via
  stable_string_list() JSON serialization, preventing extensions with
  commas in their names from producing ambiguous digests
- Add test: plan_phase_evidence_artifact_preserves_extension_boundaries
  verifies distinct digests for ["alpha,beta","gamma"] vs ["alpha","beta,gamma"]
- Reformat long expect() chains for rustfmt compliance

Verifier SDK binding hash (verifier_sdk.rs):
- Expand compute_binding_hash() from claim_id+assertion+evidence_ids
  to full surface: claim_type, subject, timestamp, evidence_refs,
  claim_ref, verification_procedure — preventing signed verification
  results from being replayed onto materially different claims
- Bump hash version prefix from v1 to v2
- Add tests: binding_hash_changes_with_subject and
  binding_hash_changes_with_verification_procedure

SDK verifier (sdk/verifier_sdk.rs):
- Extract artifact_binding_hash() that hashes each claim individually
  instead of joining them with commas, preventing comma-containing
  claims from producing ambiguous bindings
- Add test: artifact_binding_hash_preserves_claim_vector_boundaries

Universal verifier SDK (universal_verifier_sdk.rs):
- Add created_at emptiness check to validate_manifest(), rejecting
  capsules with missing creation timestamps before replay evaluation
- Add tests for empty created_at in both validate and replay paths

SDK capsule (sdk/verifier/capsule.rs):
- Add parallel created_at validation in the facade crate

Perf budget guard (perf_budget_guard.rs):
- Cap timing sample vectors via push_bounded(MAX_TIMING_SAMPLES=8192)
  to prevent unbounded memory growth in long-running performance
  collectors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
